## Constants

<a name="Group"></a>

```go
const (
    Group         = "secrets-sync.jbcom.dev"
    Version       = "v1alpha1"
    Kind          = "CredentialSynchronization"
    Resource      = "credentialsynchronizations"
    DefaultImage  = "ghcr.io/jbcom/secrets-sync:latest"
    DefaultConfig = "config.yaml"
)
```

```go
var CredentialSynchronizationGVR = schema.GroupVersionResource{
```

<a name="BuildRESTConfig"></a>
## func [BuildRESTConfig](<https://github.com/jbcom/secrets-sync/blob/main/pkg/kubernetes/controller.go#L82>)

```go
func BuildRESTConfig(kubeconfig string) (*rest.Config, error)
```

BuildRESTConfig builds cluster config from in\-cluster auth, KUBECONFIG, or \~/.kube/config. This keeps local controller smoke tests possible.

<a name="NamespacedName"></a>
## func [NamespacedName](<https://github.com/jbcom/secrets-sync/blob/main/pkg/kubernetes/controller.go#L426>)

```go
func NamespacedName(obj *unstructured.Unstructured) string
```

NamespacedName returns a stable string identifier for controller logs.

<a name="Config"></a>
## type [Config](<https://github.com/jbcom/secrets-sync/blob/main/pkg/kubernetes/controller.go#L44-L49>)

Config controls the Kubernetes controller loop.

```go
type Config struct {
    Namespace        string
    ResyncPeriod     time.Duration
    DefaultImage     string
    DefaultConfigKey string
}
```

<a name="Controller"></a>
## type [Controller](<https://github.com/jbcom/secrets-sync/blob/main/pkg/kubernetes/controller.go#L52-L56>)

Controller reconciles CredentialSynchronization resources into CronJobs.

```go
type Controller struct {
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

```go
func (c *Controller) BuildCronJob(obj *unstructured.Unstructured) (*batchv1.CronJob, error)
```

<a name="Controller.Reconcile"></a>
### func \(\*Controller\) [Reconcile](<https://github.com/jbcom/secrets-sync/blob/main/pkg/kubernetes/controller.go#L138>)

```go
func (c *Controller) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, obj *unstructured.Unstructured) error
```

Reconcile creates or updates the CronJob for a CredentialSynchronization.

<a name="Controller.ReconcileAll"></a>
### func \(\*Controller\) [ReconcileAll](<https://github.com/jbcom/secrets-sync/blob/main/pkg/kubernetes/controller.go#L121>)

```go
func (c *Controller) ReconcileAll(ctx context.Context) error
```

ReconcileAll reconciles all CredentialSynchronization resources in scope.

<a name="Controller.Run"></a>
### func \(\*Controller\) [Run](<https://github.com/jbcom/secrets-sync/blob/main/pkg/kubernetes/controller.go#L100>)

```go
func (c *Controller) Run(ctx context.Context) error
```

Run starts the reconciliation loop until the context is canceled.
